text:
A boy named Oliver loved going birdwatching. One day he noticed an odd bird hopping across tree leaves. It was a little bigger than an ordinary robin.

Oliver watched carefully. The unusual bird flew away slowly. He chased after it, but it disappeared into a thicket.

That night Oliver dreamed an extraordinary bird hovered before him. It spoke.

"Human boy, you seek an extraordinary bird. You seek me. Meet me."

The next day Oliver found a tiny bird nestled in a blossomed twig.

"That's you?" He squeaked.

"How did I evolve?"

"I... I think you just evolved bird."

He flew away fluttering.

Later in the summer sun.

"Seek my feather."

He grabbed a bunch.

That autumn his library was filled with exquisite artworks. Birds just like the odd bird.

Harry liked bird stories. He loved that odd bird. It was like nothing else.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
